finding_results.notes: Added explicit Eli interiority in the intake stretch via bodily pain response, compliance self-monitoring, and self-implicating reaction to termination language while preserving scene pace.
Replaced repetitive nod beats with differentiated actions (desk-edge pressure, can-tip directional cue, two-finger salute) to vary subtext and physical behavior under stress/fatigue.
Reframed side-character entrances to lead with immediate workflow pressure and task movement, keeping accessory detail secondary rather than intro-leading.

summary: All packet findings were resolved with constrained line-level revisions: opening interiority density restored, reaction-beat variety improved by removing nod defaults, and side-character introductions shifted to pressure-first entrances while preserving continuity and chapter voice.
